final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-panel knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era, in the warm storybook spirit of 几米's illustrated narratives.

Style/medium: single large knowledge card rendered as a children's cartoon storybook illustration, with the hand-painted warmth and narrative tenderness of 几米's picture books — each scene a small world a child wants to step into
Composition: full-bleed card layout with a bold title banner at the top, a large central cartoon narrative scene occupying the main canvas, and a structured bullet-point panel along the right or bottom edge listing key story facts with numbered markers
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs — Cao Cao's massive northern fleet on the Yangtze River facing the allied forces of Liu Bei and Sun Quan; the fire-ship strategy devised by Zhuge Liang and Zhou Yu; flames consuming the fleet; heroes clearly depicted as friendly cartoon characters recognizable to children (Zhuge Liang with feather fan, Zhou Yu commanding, Cao Cao on the flagship)
Scene/backdrop: the Yangtze River at night lit by the great fire, smoke curling into a star-filled sky, the river surface shimmering orange and gold, distant hills silhouetted in warm haze
Lighting/mood: the dramatic glow of firelight against a deep river night — thrilling yet safe, the way a campfire story feels to a child tucked in bed
Color palette: warm amber and flame-orange in conversation with deep river-blue and night-sky indigo, punctuated by the bright primary colors of the cartoon character costumes
Materials/textures: smooth matte card stock feel with soft watercolor washes and clean ink outlines, the texture of a beloved picture book page
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战 (title banner); bullet points listing: ①时间：公元208年 ②地点：长江赤壁 ③主要人物：曹操、刘备、孙权、诸葛亮、周瑜 ④关键策略：火攻连环计 ⑤结果：曹操大败，三国鼎立格局形成
Constraints: all text legible at card viewing size; bullet-point panel clearly separated from the illustration area; child-friendly cartoon style throughout — no frightening imagery; title banner prominent at top
Avoid: realistic gore or war violence, dark horror atmosphere, adult-oriented historical realism, cluttered illegible text, generic stock infographic style
